decks.name: Hiragana あ行
decks.description: The 5 vowels — the very first row of hiragana every learner starts with

cards.back: a  —  as in 'f-a-ther'
i  —  as in 'mach-i-ne'
u  —  short 'oo', lips unrounded (no pucker)
e  —  as in 'b-e-d'
o  —  as in 'b-o-ne'

decks.name: Hiragana か行
decks.description: K-row — ka, ki, ku, ke, ko

cards.back: ka  —  as in 'c-a-r'
ki  —  as in 'k-ee-p'
ku  —  as in 'c-oo-l' (short)
ke  —  as in 'k-e-t'
ko  —  as in 'c-o-at'

decks.name: Hiragana さ行
decks.description: S-row — sa, shi, su, se, so  (note: 'si' becomes 'shi' in Japanese)

cards.back: sa  —  as in 's-a-d'
shi  —  as in 'sh-ee-p'  (NOT 'si')
su  —  as in 's-oo-n' (very short u)
se  —  as in 's-e-t'
so  —  as in 's-o-ap'

decks.name: Kanji: Nature
decks.description: Common nature kanji — all appear in everyday words and day names

cards.back:
にち / ひ  (nichi / hi)  —  sun; day
Ex: 今日 (きょう) = today

つき / げつ  (tsuki / getsu)  —  moon; month
Ex: 今月 (こんげつ) = this month

やま  (yama)  —  mountain
Ex: 富士山 (ふじさん) = Mt Fuji

かわ  (kawa)  —  river
Ex: 川口 (かわぐち) = Kawaguchi city

ひ / か  (hi / ka)  —  fire
Ex: 火山 (かざん) = volcano

き / もく  (ki / moku)  —  tree; wood
Ex: 木々 (きぎ) = trees

みず / すい  (mizu / sui)  —  water
Ex: 水道 (すいどう) = tap water

つち / ど  (tsuchi / do)  —  earth; soil
Ex: 土地 (とち) = land

そら / くう  (sora / kuu)  —  sky; empty
Ex: 青空 (あおぞら) = blue sky

はな  (hana)  —  flower
Ex: 花火 (はなび) = fireworks

decks.name: Kanji: People & Daily Life
decks.description: High-frequency kanji for people, time, and everyday objects

cards.back:
ひと / じん  (hito / jin)  —  person
Ex: 日本人 (にほんじん) = Japanese person

こ / し  (ko / shi)  —  child
Ex: 子供 (こども) = child

おんな / じょ  (onna / jo)  —  woman
Ex: 女の子 (おんなのこ) = girl

おとこ / だん  (otoko / dan)  —  man
Ex: 男の子 (おとこのこ) = boy

とし / ねん  (toshi / nen)  —  year
Ex: 今年 (ことし) = this year

とき / じ  (toki / ji)  —  time; hour
Ex: 何時 (なんじ) = what time?

たべる / しょく  (taberu / shoku)  —  eat; food
Ex: 食事 (しょくじ) = meal

ほん / もと  (hon / moto)  —  book; origin
Ex: 日本 (にほん) = Japan

おお / だい  (oo / dai)  —  big; great
Ex: 大学 (だいがく) = university

ちい / しょう  (chii / shou)  —  small
Ex: 小学校 (しょうがっこう) = primary school
